title: gratiola floridana
intro: Gratiola floridana, also known as Florida hedge hyssop or Florida bugleweed, is a perennial herb native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Gratiola floridana include its potential to treat colds, coughs, and bronchitis, as well as its ability to reduce anxiety and stress. Gratiola floridana can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to support immune function and overall well-being.
